name: Bacon and Cheese Puff
recipeIngredient: 1 dash red pepper sauce (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp; remove from pan and drain.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon.
3. In the bacon drippings, cook onions until soft.
4. Arrange half of the bread slices in a single layer at the bottom of a greased 9 x 13 inch pan or casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle with half of the crumbled bacon, onions, and shredded cheese.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients: eggs, milk, salt, pepper, and red pepper sauce (or to taste).
7. Pour the mixture over the top layer in the pan.
8. Refrigerate any leftovers until just before serving time.
Bake at 375°F until the mixture is set and the top is puffed and golden, about 50 minutes. This recipe serves 8. The dish can be halved and baked in an 8-inch square pan for about 40 minutes.
